title: daphniphyllum gracile
intro: Daphniphyllum gracile, also known as the Chinese daphniphyllum or Yew-like daphniphyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Daphniphyllaceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, as well as its ability to treat fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Daphniphyllum gracile include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Daphniphyllum gracile typically involve boiling the leaves or stems in water to create a tea, or using the plant in combination with other herbs in a decoction.
